<p>Pakistan and nine other countries on Tuesday issued a joint statement condemning Israel’s <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/2001403/edhi-scion-among-gaza-bound-activists-captured-by-israel">interception</a> of the Global Sumud Flotilla.</p>

news.headline: Russia to conduct three-day nuclear drills on May 19-21
news.summary: Russia's armed forces will carry out exercises of its nuclear forces from May 19 to 21, the defence ministry said on Tuesday. The drills will include more than 65,000 troops and 7,800 types of equipment and weapons, the ministry said.
